name: ccstat
description: Compact two-line status display for Claude Code sessions — git, cost, context, rate limits at a glance.

interface.shortDescription: Live session stats in your Claude Code statusline.
interface.longDescription: Adds a two-line statusline to every Claude Code session showing: directory, git branch and status, active model, cost, $/hour, context bar, token speed, session duration, lines changed, and Pro rate limit countdowns.
